prompt: Create a landing page hero section as a single HTML file with inline CSS. It should be for a SaaS product called 'Breakout' that helps track deadlines. Include: a top announcement bar saying 'Introducing Smart Reminders', a big hero heading, a subtitle paragraph, a primary CTA button 'Start free trial' and a secondary ghost button 'Watch demo', and a row of trusted-by company logos. Also include a dark mode toggle that switches the whole section to dark mode. Make it look modern and clean.

assertions.text: Hero heading has negative letter-spacing (e.g., -0.02em, -0.03em, -2%, or similar negative value)
Hero heading line-height is between 1.0 and 1.25 (or 100%-125%, or a tight absolute value)
One filled/solid button and one transparent/outline/ghost button are present side by side
Grouped elements have tighter spacing (e.g., 16px) than section-level gaps (e.g., 32px or larger)
Dark mode uses lighter surface colors for cards/sections than the page background (not shadows for depth)
Announcement bar uses a smaller font size than the heading and has distinct visual treatment (color, border, or background)
